summary: Plan-mode inventory classification repaired after deterministic validation. No GitHub mutations are recommended. Three non-security PRs remain independent backlog items for this live PR inventory shard, and the two validator-flagged security-sensitive PR targets are routed as exact-item security actions.

actions.reason: Open PR with a narrow test-only change and failed proof gate; no duplicate/superseding canonical is hydrated or intended for this inventory shard.
Open focused CLI bug-fix PR with failed proof gate; no hydrated duplicate or superseding PR is available in this shard.
Draft PR with supplied proof and active author wait state; keep it as an independent work item rather than closing or escalating the whole cluster.
Validator classified this exact PR target as security-sensitive; route it to central OpenClaw security handling instead of ProjectClownfish backlog triage.
